items.name_en: гҖҗPremium Quality Factory OriginalгҖ‘рҹ’—Goyard Jouvence Toiletry Bag рҹ‘қрҹ‘қ
items.name_cn:
гҖҗPremium Quality Factory OriginalгҖ‘рҹ’—Goyard Jouvence Toiletry Bag рҹ‘қрҹ‘қ
 The Goyard Jouvence series is a classic in Goyard's art of life and travel! Handcrafted from cowhide, paired with a yellow lining, featuring an inner and outer pocket design рҹ‘ӣрҹ‘ӣ Simple, lightweight, sturdy, and durable. The clean and tidy lining and elegant appearance make it an indispensable functional product for travel рҹ’ғрҹ’ғ
 рҹ”ҶThe large toiletry bag is the perfect choice for large capacity storage рҹ”ҶThe small toiletry bag is for carrying essentials, accommodating quick touch-ups, and can also be used as a small wallet and clutch, representing Goyard's practicality and urban style.
Size GM size :30x23Г—7.5cm
рҹ”Һ 020206
